author: han0110
content:
New release of `zkboost` is available [`zkboost@v0.9.0`](https://github.com/eth-act/zkboost/releases/tag/v0.9.0), the full change logs can be found [here](https://github.com/eth-act/zkboost/releases/tag/v0.9.0), some highlights:

- Breaking Changes
  - `ChainConfig` is introduced and needed for `/v1/execution_proof_requests` and `/v1/execution_proof_verifications` API call, which is defined in [`execution-specs@tests-zkevm@v0.4.1`](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/tree/tests-zkevm%40v0.4.1) (just a heads-up this will be changed again in next release of spec, I'll also try to PR to `lighthouse` and `prysm`)
  - `POST /v1/execution_proof_requests` now takes SSZ encoded `ProofRequestBody` and no url params (moved into body)
  - `POST /v1/execution_proof_verifications` now takes SSZ encoded `ProofVerificationBody` and no url params (moved into body)
  - `ProofTypes` is updated to `[ethrex-openvm, ethrex-sp1, ethrex-zisk, reth-openvm, reth-sp1, reth-zisk]`
  - Updated API rendered can be found [here](https://petstore.swagger.io/?url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eth-act/zkboost/refs/tags/v0.9.0/openapi.json)

- PRs
  - `ethereum-package` - https://github.com/ethpandaops/ethereum-package/pull/1450 (merged)
  - `lighthouse` - https://github.com/eth-act/lighthouse/pull/40 (open)
  - `prysm` - https://github.com/OffchainLabs/prysm/compare/optional-proofs...han0110:prysm:feature/zkboost-v0.9.0 (happy to submit a PR it the changes make sense)

Tagging <@402080271563751435> <@531934490826768418>  for visibility.
